title: Pan-Seared Sea Bass with Sweet Treat Glaze
description: A keto-friendly dish featuring pan-seared sea bass topped with a sweet treat glaze.
instructions: Rinse the sea bass fillets and pat dry with paper towels.
Season the sea bass with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Heat the coconut oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the sea bass for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked about halfway through.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, mix the sweet treat and lemon juice in a small saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2-3 minutes, or until thickened.
Remove the skillet from the oven and brush the sweet treat glaze over the sea bass.
